items.markdown:
Himalayan salt stones are available in various forms depending on your intended use, ranging from smooth massage tools and cooking blocks to raw decorative chunks.[[1]](https://purespadirect.com/blogs/pure-spa-direct-blog/unlocking-the-benefits-of-salt-stones-in-spa-treatments#:~:text=By%20adding%20massage%20oils%20or%20essential%20oils%2C,to%20incorporate%20these%20stones%20into%20their%20practice.)[[2]](https://www.peacocksalt.com/blog/himalayan-pink-salt#:~:text=Blocks%20of%20solid%20Himalayan%20salt%2C%20cut%20in,but%20seasoning%20your%20food%20while%20it%20cooks.)[[3]](https://cookinglife.eu/collections/salt-stone#:~:text=You%20can%20buy%20the%20salt%20stones%20in,dishes%20or%20for%20cooking%20on%20the%20table.)[[4]](https://www.etsy.com/uk/market/large_himalayan_salt_lamp#:~:text=Raw%20Pink%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Crystals%20-%20Natural,The%20salt%20has%20a%20rough%2C%20textured%20surface.)

**Massage & Wellness Stones** 

These stones are hand-carved into smooth shapes for therapeutic use. They can be heated to loosen muscles or chilled to alleviate pain.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7682419989025984479,catalogid:11245814031762349516,gpcid:17194980500836121378,mid:576462511360630855&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.naturedayspaok.com/news/the-5-benefits-of-himalayan-salt-stone-massage#:~:text=The%20pressure%20and%20heat%20from,caused%20by%20eczema%20and%20psoriasis.)[[3]](https://www.amazon.ae/Himalayan-Massage-Crystal-Hand-Carved-Deodorant/dp/B01MY79ZZG#:~:text=The%20Pure%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Works%20Heart%20Massage,benefits%20may%20vary%20depending%20on%20individual%20preferences.)[[4]](https://www.walmart.com/ip/Pure-Himalayan-Salt-Works-Flat-Oval-Massage-Stone-Pink-Crystal-Hand-Carved-Stone-Therapy-Deodorant-Sugar-Scrubs-Pack-12/5233654139#:~:text=Himalayan%20%28%20Himalayan%20Mountains%20%29%20Rock%20Salt,When%20used%20frozen-%20it%20helps%20alleviate%20pain.)[[5]](https://www.complexions.com/what-are-himalayan-salt-stones/#:~:text=What%20are%20Himalayan%20Salt%20Stones?%20Warm%20Salt,for%20sports%20recovery%20or%20specific%20pain%20relief.)

- **[Himalayan Salt Stone Round](https://www.saltability.com/products/himalayan-salt-stone-round)** : A single 3" diameter round stone with flat sides for $15.00.
- **[Pure Himalayan Salt Works Heart Stone](https://tngworldwide.com/massage-stone-heart)** : A heart-shaped pink salt stone for targeted therapy, priced at $2.99.
- **[Saltability 6-Stone Massage Set](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/products-saltability-6-himalayan-salt-stone-set-281-0272/)** : Includes two oval, two round, and two teardrop stones for $59.95.
- **[Theratools Large Round Massage Tool](https://purespadirect.com/products/theratools-himalayan-salt-round-massage-tool-large-3-0-inches-diameter-vu-307890?variant=47824935977271&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : A 3.0 3.0 3.0 inch diameter hand-carved stone for $8.95.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15859114735508556322,catalogid:14866516211070522170,gpcid:14549605862805027597&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7682419989025984479,catalogid:11245814031762349516,gpcid:17194980500836121378,mid:576462511360630855&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2544047339346391352&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1759729385702054717,catalogid:14301120647531296627,gpcid:8002529909757812194,mid:576462836158885691&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://naturesown.com/shop-1/ols/products/pink-salt-round-massage-stone)

**Cooking & Grilling Blocks** 

Large salt slabs are used for searing meats or serving chilled appetizers like sushi.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15717551944726826182,catalogid:16265930623965907351,gpcid:4608230204276626810&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4314600206468920855,catalogid:8105819657613608768,gpcid:18353100588719257294,mid:576462756709480145&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://business.walmart.com/ip/Himalayan-Salt-Block-Cooking-Plate-12-x-8-1-5-Inch-Grilling-Cutting-Serving-Food-Grade-Rock-Stone-Unique-Gifts-Smoker-Griller-Men-Women-Fathers-Cooks/14850509920#:~:text=Heat%20your%20Himalayan%20salt%20slab%2C%20plate%2C%20or,fruit%20and%20vegetables%2C%20and%20even%20cold%20desserts.)[[4]](https://www.webstaurantstore.com/8-round-himalayan-salt-slab-case/102SLABROUND.html#:~:text=In%20contrast%20to%20traditional%20cook-%20and%20serveware%2C,or%20Caribbean%20lime%20shrimp%20sprinkled%20with%20cilantro.)[[5]](https://seasalt.com/salt-101/about-himalayan-salt/using-himalayan-salt-blocks#:~:text=For%20Serving:%20Himalayan%20salt%20slabs%20are%20perfect,way%20to%20present%20cold%20desserts%2C%20even%20sorbet!)

- **[Black Tai Salt Co. Himalayan Salt Brick](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/himalayansaltslab8x12x2defaulttitle?variant=1656944689181&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : An 8"×1 2"×2" food-grade slab for $44.00.
- **[Himalayan Pink Salt Cooking Block with Tray](https://www.pinksaltwall.com/collections/salt-cooking-blocks/products/himalayan-salt-cooking-plate-12-8-1-5)** : A 1 2"×8"×2" block including a free steel tray for $30.00 $36.00.
- **[Himalayan Salterz Cooking Block](https://himalayansalterz.com/collections/salt-cooking-block/products/cooking-plate)** : A standard 1 2"×8"×1.5" block for $28.49.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15717551944726826182,catalogid:16265930623965907351,gpcid:4608230204276626810&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3812366173873624161,catalogid:7744837126976348658,gpcid:2204660262478572119,mid:576462870425897694&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3887116506409150713,catalogid:17132855560574873665,gpcid:5042086947825277428&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.liberia.ubuy.com/product/Y22CQZX0-himalayan-salt-plate-large-8-x12-x2-one-year-platinum-guarantee-when-purchased-by-black-tai-salt-co#:~:text=Crafted%20with%20care%20and%20expertise%20by%20Black,taste%20and%20mineral-rich%20seasoning%20to%20your%20food.)[[5]](https://utesaplus.net/items/Himalayan-Salt-Block-Cooking-Plate-12-quot-x8-quot-x2-quot-With/1018495#:~:text=Himalayan%20Salt%20Block%20Cooking%20Plate%2012%22x8%22x2%22%20With,vendor:%20Usually%20ships%20within%203%20business%20days.)

**Decorative & Raw Chunks** 

Raw salt chunks are ideal for DIY salt lamps, air purification, or decorative bowl fillers.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:9082777542035657817,catalogid:2729489038279913658,gpcid:7066390517169279640&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7056457142930633742&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://himalayantradingco.com/products/raw-himalayan-pink-salt-chunks#:~:text=Raw%20Himalayan%20Pink%20Salt%20Chunks%20%E2%80%93%205,salt%20chunk%20lamps%2C%20fire%20bowls%2C%20or%20baskets.)[[4]](https://www.nordicrooms.com.au/blog/nordic-rooms-journal/the-benefits-of-salt-rocks-beyond-the-kitchen/#:~:text=Salt%20rocks%20are%20typically%20smaller%2C%20raw%20crystals,designed%20for%20specific%20uses%2C%20particularly%20in%20cooking.)

- **[Himalayan Pink Salt Chunks (1"-2.5")](https://www.etsy.com/listing/550833399/himalayan-pink-salt-chunks-natural?gpla=1&gao=1&)** : Mixed natural chunks for energy cleansing or decor starting at $1.41.
- **[Black Tai Salt Co. Chunk Sole Rocks](https://www.blacktaisaltco.com/products/food-grade-himalayan-chunk-sole-rocks-1-3-size-20-pounds?variant=3062405365789&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : A bulk 20-pound bag of 1"−3" food-grade rocks for $39.95.
- **[Himalayan Secrets Large Boulders](https://himalayansecrets.com/products/pink-25-30-lbs?variant=40721111285928&country=US&currency=USD&utm_medium=product_sync&utm_source=google&utm_content=sag_organic&utm_campaign=sag_organic)** : Large 25–30 lb unprocessed salt chunks for animal licks or large decor for $89.95.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7056457142930633742&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1833921415682699475,catalogid:15653553348904909734,gpcid:3701288958943729372,mid:576462775839948222&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:3267489592603686894,catalogid:2269806925329423359,gpcid:5210735858499559172&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.jiomart.com/p/groceries/kush-gold-himalayan-pink-rock-salt-crystal-chunks-stone-84-minerals-size-1-to-2-5-inches-1kg/597745861#:~:text=100%25%20Authentic%2C%20pure%20&%20natural%20Himalayan%20salt,candle%20jars%20for%20a%20beautiful%20salt%20lamp.)[[5]](https://www.ubuy.com.zm/product/DOC29HW-skullis-natural-pink-himalayan-salt-rock-chunks-stone-5-pounds-rocks-crystals-for-basket-and-bowl-salt-lamp-1-to-2-inches-mixed-size#:~:text=Answer:%20Absolutely!%20Skullis%20Natural%20Pink%20Himalayan%20Salt,your%20centerpieces%20to%20create%20visually%20appealing%20arrangements.)

**Care Instructions** 

- **Keep Dry** : Salt stones will dissolve or roughen if exposed to water; wipe with a damp cloth and dry immediately after use.
- **Smoothing** : If stones become rough, they can be sanded with fine-grit sandpaper to restore a smooth surface.
- **Gradual Heating** : For cooking blocks, heat slowly on the grill or stove to prevent cracking.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2544047339346391352&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17355820567883728560,catalogid:18383953190279965674&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15859114735508556322,catalogid:14866516211070522170,gpcid:14549605862805027597&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1759729385702054717,catalogid:14301120647531296627,gpcid:8002529909757812194,mid:576462836158885691&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15717551944726826182,catalogid:16265930623965907351,gpcid:4608230204276626810&ibp=oshop)

Are you looking for these stones for **massage therapy**, **gourmet cooking** , or **home decor**?

items.title: Care Instructions
items.text: Keep Dry : Salt stones will dissolve or roughen if exposed to water; wipe with a damp cloth and dry immediately after use. Smoothing : If stones become rough, they can be sanded with fine-grit sandpaper to restore a smooth surface. Gradual Heating : For cooking blocks, heat slowly on the grill or stove to prevent cracking.
items.markdown:
- **Keep Dry** : Salt stones will dissolve or roughen if exposed to water; wipe with a damp cloth and dry immediately after use.
- **Smoothing** : If stones become rough, they can be sanded with fine-grit sandpaper to restore a smooth surface.
- **Gradual Heating** : For cooking blocks, heat slowly on the grill or stove to prevent cracking.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:2544047339346391352&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:17355820567883728560,catalogid:18383953190279965674&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15859114735508556322,catalogid:14866516211070522170,gpcid:14549605862805027597&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1759729385702054717,catalogid:14301120647531296627,gpcid:8002529909757812194,mid:576462836158885691&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15717551944726826182,catalogid:16265930623965907351,gpcid:4608230204276626810&ibp=oshop)
